title: Coast guard rescue
text: After the overnight crossing, aid groups urged the government to expand reception capacity and protect asylum seekers from further harm.

title: Labour shortage debate
text: Farm employers argued that tighter visa rules are worsening labour shortages and leaving seasonal crops unharvested.

title: Police raid report
text: Following the police raid, ministers said stronger border checks were needed to disrupt trafficking networks and keep communities safe.

title: Municipal housing dispute
text: Local officials said the arrivals plan will strain housing, schools, and health services unless national funding increases.

title: Community sponsorship programme
text: Volunteers described the sponsorship programme as a humane response that helps displaced families rebuild their lives.

title: Election rally speech
text: At the rally, the candidate linked migration to crime while also warning that welfare costs were rising too fast.
